description: A protocol amendment (Amendment 02) recently introduced Version 2.0 of the 'Vital Signs' and 'Physical Exam' Case Report Forms (CRFs) to capture additional safety data points. However, data monitoring shows that some site coordinators are still accidentally selecting Version 1.0 from the dropdown menu during data entry. To physically prevent this and enforce compliance, remove Version 1.0 of both the 'Vital Signs' and 'Physical Exam' CRFs in the Global CRF Library using the OpenClinica credentials (login: root / Admin123!). Ensure that Version 2.0 of both forms remains available and that the parent CRF entities are not removed.
